/usr/bin/ar qc libocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.a CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/gnb_cu_configuration_update_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_setup_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_removal_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_ue_context_setup_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_ue_context_modification_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_ue_context_release_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_reset_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_initiated_reset_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_gnbdu_config_update_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_positioning_information_exchange_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_trp_information_exchange_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_positioning_measurement_procedure.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.dir/f1ap_du_paging_procedure.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libocudu_f1ap_du_procedures.a
